title: A New Member of the Family

all.en: The Lin family had been planning to adopt a puppy for over six months.
all.zh: 林家為了領養一隻小狗已經計畫超過六個月了。

all.en: Finally, on a sunny Saturday morning, they drove to the local animal shelter.
all.zh: 終於在一個陽光普照的星期六早上，他們開車去了當地的動物收容所。

all.en: Eight-year-old Mia could barely sit still in the back seat.
all.zh: 八歲的米雅在後座幾乎坐不住。

all.en: At the shelter, dozens of dogs barked excitedly when the family walked past their cages.
all.zh: 在收容所裡，幾十隻狗在這家人經過籠子時興奮地汪汪叫。

all.en: One small brown puppy with floppy ears caught Mia's attention right away.
all.zh: 一隻棕色、耳朵下垂的小狗立刻吸引了米雅的目光。

all.en: "Mom, look at his eyes! He's choosing us," she whispered, kneeling by the cage.
all.zh: 「媽，看牠的眼睛！牠在選我們，」她跪在籠子旁邊輕聲說。

all.en: The shelter worker said the puppy was three months old and very gentle.
all.zh: 收容所的工作人員說小狗三個月大，個性非常溫和。

all.en: Dad signed the adoption papers while Mom bought a leash, a bed, and a bag of food.
all.zh: 爸爸簽領養文件時，媽媽買了牽繩、狗床和一包飼料。

all.en: They named him Coco because his fur was the same color as chocolate.
all.zh: 他們給牠取名叫可可，因為牠的毛跟巧克力同色。

all.en: On the way home, Coco curled up on Mia's lap and fell fast asleep.
all.zh: 回家的路上，可可蜷縮在米雅腿上，很快就睡著了。

all.en: That night, Mia secretly let him sleep on her bed even though Mom had said no.
all.zh: 那天晚上，米雅偷偷讓牠睡在自己床上，雖然媽媽說過不行。

all.en: Coco became the heart of the family within just a few weeks.
all.zh: 才短短幾個星期，可可就成了這個家的核心。

all.en: Within a month, Coco had learned to sit, shake hands, and wait by the door for his walks.
all.zh: 短短一個月，可可就學會了坐下、握手，還會在門邊等著去散步。

all.en: Mia took him to puppy training class every Saturday and proudly showed off his progress.
all.zh: 米雅每週六帶牠去幼犬訓練班，得意地展示牠的進步。

all.en: Dad built a small wooden doghouse for the backyard, even though Coco preferred the sofa.
all.zh: 爸爸在後院蓋了一間小木造狗屋，雖然可可比較愛沙發。

all.en: One rainy evening, Coco surprised everyone by bringing Mia's slippers to her.
all.zh: 一個下雨的傍晚，可可叼來米雅的拖鞋，讓大家都嚇了一跳。

all.en: Mom finally gave in and bought Coco a soft cushion to keep next to Mia's bed.
all.zh: 媽媽終於讓步，買了一個柔軟的墊子放在米雅床邊給可可。

all.en: The whole family started taking longer walks in the park because of Coco's endless energy.
all.zh: 因為可可精力無窮，全家人開始在公園散步散得更久。

all.en: Mia became more responsible since she had to feed and brush him every single day.
all.zh: 米雅變得更有責任感，因為她每天都得餵牠、幫牠刷毛。

all.en: On Coco's first birthday, they celebrated with a special doggy cake from a pet bakery.
all.zh: 可可一歲生日那天，他們特地買了寵物烘焙坊的狗狗蛋糕慶祝。

all.en: Friends and neighbors stopped by to meet the dog they had heard so much about.
all.zh: 朋友和鄰居紛紛來拜訪這隻久仰大名的小狗。

all.en: Mia hugged Coco tightly and whispered that he was the best gift she had ever received.
all.zh: 米雅緊緊抱著可可，輕聲說牠是她收過最棒的禮物。

all.en: As Coco grew older, Mia trained him to fetch the newspaper from the front gate every morning.
all.zh: 隨著可可漸漸長大，米雅訓練牠每天早上去大門口叼報紙進來。

all.en: Neighbors stopped by just to watch the clever little dog perform his daily routine.
all.zh: 鄰居們特地停下腳步，欣賞這隻聰明的小狗每天的例行任務。

all.en: One winter morning, Coco refused to come inside and kept barking at the back fence.
all.zh: 某個冬日清晨，可可不肯進屋，一直對著後院的圍籬叫個不停。

all.en: Dad investigated and found a stray kitten trapped between two old wooden boards.
all.zh: 爸爸過去查看，發現有一隻流浪小貓被卡在兩塊舊木板之間。

all.en: The family rescued the tiny kitten and gave her warm milk and a soft towel by the heater.
all.zh: 全家把小貓救出來，給她熱牛奶並在暖氣旁鋪了一條柔軟的毛巾。

all.en: Mia begged her parents to keep the kitten, and they agreed after seeing how gentle Coco was with her.
all.zh: 米雅求爸媽留下小貓，看到可可對她那麼溫柔，他們便答應了。

all.en: They named the kitten Cookie, and the two pets became inseparable within a single week.
all.zh: 他們把小貓取名叫餅乾，這兩隻寵物在短短一週內就形影不離。

all.en: Coco often shared his food bowl with Cookie, and Mia recorded their friendship on her phone.
all.zh: 可可常常把自己的飼料碗分給餅乾吃，米雅用手機記錄下他們的友情。

all.en: Her short video of the pair sleeping together received thousands of likes online overnight.
all.zh: 她那段兩隻寵物一起睡覺的短片，一夜之間在網路上獲得幾千個讚。

all.en: Mia smiled, realizing that adopting Coco had truly brought endless love into their home.
all.zh: 米雅微笑著，體會到領養可可真的為他們的家帶來了無盡的愛。

all.en: As Cookie grew, she developed a habit of stealing Mia's hair ties and hiding them under the sofa.
all.zh: 餅乾長大後，養成了偷米雅髮圈、把它們藏到沙發底下的習慣。

all.en: Coco watched her mischief with patient eyes, occasionally letting out a low, amused bark.
all.zh: 可可用耐心的眼神看著她的調皮舉動，偶爾發出一聲低低的、像在偷笑的吠聲。

all.en: Mom finally collected the missing hair ties one afternoon and counted nearly twenty of them.
all.zh: 某天下午媽媽終於把失蹤的髮圈全收集起來，一數將近有二十條。

all.en: Mia laughed and made a small basket on her dresser just for Cookie's stolen treasures.
all.zh: 米雅笑著在梳妝台上做了一個小籃子，專門放餅乾偷來的寶物。

all.en: Dad started filming short videos of the two animals every Sunday morning as a family hobby.
all.zh: 爸爸開始每週日早上拍攝兩隻動物的短片，當作全家的興趣。

all.en: Their online following grew, and several pet shops asked if Coco and Cookie could star in ads.
all.zh: 他們的網路追蹤者越來越多，好幾家寵物店都問可可和餅乾能不能拍廣告。

all.en: Mia decided to donate all earnings from the videos to the shelter where Coco had once lived.
all.zh: 米雅決定把所有影片的收入捐給可可曾經住過的收容所。

all.en: The shelter staff invited the family to visit and personally meet other puppies awaiting adoption.
all.zh: 收容所工作人員邀請全家人到場參觀，親自認識其他等待領養的小狗。

all.en: Mia spoke quietly to each cage, promising the animals that someone kind would soon find them.
all.zh: 米雅輕聲對著每個籠子說話，向動物們承諾很快就會有善良的人來找牠們。

all.en: On the drive home, she vowed to keep using her videos to bring more love to forgotten pets.
all.zh: 回家的路上，她下定決心要繼續用她的影片，把更多的愛帶給被遺忘的寵物。

all.en: Mia began visiting the shelter every other weekend to walk dogs that had no families yet.
all.zh: 米雅開始每隔一個週末就到收容所，幫那些還沒有家的狗散步。

all.en: Coco and Cookie often came along, calming the shy newcomers with their friendly behavior.
all.zh: 可可和餅乾常常一起去，用牠們親切的舉動安撫害羞的新成員。

all.en: One older golden retriever became especially attached to Coco and waited eagerly for each visit.
all.zh: 有一隻年紀較大的黃金獵犬對可可特別依賴，每次來訪都熱切地等著。

all.en: Mia took photos of every dog she walked and shared them on her growing social media page.
all.zh: 米雅幫她遛過的每隻狗都拍了照，分享到她日漸壯大的社群媒體頁面上。

all.en: Two of the dogs found loving homes within weeks because of the posts Mia had created.
all.zh: 因為米雅發布的貼文，其中兩隻狗在幾週內就找到了充滿愛的新家。

all.en: The shelter manager called her a true hero and presented her with a small certificate of thanks.
all.zh: 收容所所長稱她是真正的英雄，並頒給她一張小小的感謝狀。

all.en: Dad hung the certificate in the hallway beside their first family photo with Coco.
all.zh: 爸爸把感謝狀掛在走廊上，就在他們和可可的第一張全家福旁邊。

all.en: Mom started baking homemade dog treats every Saturday for Mia to bring to the shelter dogs.
all.zh: 媽媽開始每週六做手工狗點心，讓米雅帶去給收容所的狗狗們。

all.en: Cookie watched the baking sessions closely, sometimes sneaking under the table for a fallen crumb.
all.zh: 餅乾總是密切觀察烘焙過程，偶爾溜到桌下撿一塊掉下來的碎屑。

all.en: Mia smiled and realized that one small adoption had quietly grown into a mission of endless kindness.
all.zh: 米雅微笑著體會到，當初一次小小的領養，竟悄悄擴展成一份無盡的善意使命。

all.en: Mia continued visiting the shelter every Saturday, leading new volunteers through the gentle introduction process.
all.zh: 米亞繼續每個週六到收容所，帶領新志工完成溫和的入門流程。

all.en: Cookie grew calmer and more confident, often guiding Coco toward the shy dogs hiding in the back kennels.
all.zh: 餅乾變得越來越冷靜自信，常常帶著可可走向躲在後排籠子裡害羞的狗狗。

all.en: Mom expanded her treat baking, donating two boxes of homemade snacks to the shelter every weekend.
all.zh: 媽媽擴大了她的點心烘焙，每個週末都捐兩盒自製零食給收容所。

all.en: Dad volunteered to repair the shelter's old wooden fences and built two new resting platforms for the dogs.
all.zh: 爸爸自願修補收容所的舊木柵欄，還為狗狗們蓋了兩個新的休息平台。

all.en: A neighbor saw Mia's kindness online and donated a year's supply of premium food to the shelter.
all.zh: 一位鄰居在網路上看到米亞的善舉，捐了一整年的高級飼料給收容所。

all.en: The local newspaper wrote a small feature about the family and titled it One Adoption, Many Lives.
all.zh: 當地報紙寫了一篇小專題，標題是「一次領養，許多生命」。

all.en: Three more families adopted dogs after reading the story, and Mia received heartfelt thank-you cards from each.
all.zh: 看到這則故事後，又有三個家庭領養了狗狗，米亞收到了每家寄來的感謝卡。

all.en: On Cookie's first adoption anniversary, the family hosted a small backyard party with all the adopters.
all.zh: 餅乾領養一週年那天，全家在後院舉辦了一場小派對，邀請了所有的領養家庭。

all.en: All seven dogs played together happily, while their humans shared stories of patience, fear, and joy.
all.zh: 七隻狗狗開心地玩在一起，主人們則分享著耐心、恐懼與喜悅的故事。

all.en: Mia hugged Cookie tightly that evening, knowing one small choice had created a beautiful chain of love.
all.zh: 那晚米亞緊緊抱住餅乾，明白一個小小的選擇已經串起了一條美麗的愛之鏈。

all.en: The following spring, Mia organized a small adoption fair in her own neighborhood park.
all.zh: 隔年春天，米雅在自家社區公園舉辦了一場小型的領養園遊會。

all.en: She invited the shelter, three pet stores, and several local bakeries to set up friendly weekend booths.
all.zh: 她邀請了收容所、三間寵物店和好幾家當地烘焙坊，在週末擺設友善的攤位。

all.en: Coco wore a small green vest that read Adopt, Love, Repeat in cheerful white embroidered letters.
all.zh: 可可穿著一件小綠背心，上面用歡快的白色繡線寫著「領養、去愛、再領養一次」。

all.en: Cookie sat calmly in a sunny corner, charming visitors and posing for many close-up photographs.
all.zh: 餅乾安靜地坐在陽光照射的角落，逗得來訪的人著迷，並乖乖讓大家拍下許多特寫照片。

all.en: By the end of the day, six dogs and two cats had met families willing to bring them home.
all.zh: 活動結束時，有六隻狗和兩隻貓遇到了願意帶牠們回家的家庭。

all.en: Mia made sure each adopter received a small handbook full of training tips and shelter contact information.
all.zh: 米雅確保每位領養人都收到一本小手冊，裡面有訓練秘訣和收容所的聯絡資訊。

all.en: Mom served warm cookies and tea while Dad explained how to introduce new pets to existing family members.
all.zh: 媽媽端出熱餅乾和茶，爸爸則解說如何讓新寵物與家中既有成員順利相處。

all.en: A reporter from the same newspaper returned to cover the event and called Mia an emerging young leader.
all.zh: 之前那位記者再次來採訪這場活動，並稱米雅是一位嶄露頭角的年輕領袖。

all.en: That night, Mia opened a brand new notebook to plan a larger fair for the upcoming summer holiday.
all.zh: 那晚，米雅翻開一本全新的筆記本，開始規劃即將到來的暑假更大規模的園遊會。

all.en: Coco and Cookie curled up beside her, quietly reminding her how a single act of kindness can grow.
all.zh: 可可和餅乾依偎在她身邊，靜靜提醒著她，一份小小的善意能夠不斷成長茁壯。

all.en: During the summer holiday, Mia organized her second adoption fair at a much larger community park.
all.zh: 暑假期間，米雅在一個大得多的社區公園舉辦了她的第二場領養園遊會。

all.en: Three shelters from neighboring towns joined this time, each bringing dozens of hopeful animals to meet families.
all.zh: 這次有三家鄰近城鎮的收容所一起參加，每家都帶來幾十隻滿懷希望的動物與家庭見面。

all.en: Mia trained twenty teenage volunteers in advance so every guest would feel welcomed and well guided.
all.zh: 米雅事先訓練了二十位青少年志工，讓每位訪客都能感受到熱情的歡迎和良好的引導。

all.en: Coco proudly led short walking demonstrations, showing how confidence and gentle handling could win any dog's trust.
all.zh: 可可得意地進行短短的散步示範，展現自信與溫柔的引導如何贏得任何狗狗的信任。

all.en: Cookie was given her own quiet booth where visitors could practice gentle interaction with shy cats.
all.zh: 餅乾擁有自己的安靜小攤，訪客可以在那裡練習用溫柔的方式與害羞的貓咪互動。

all.en: Mom brought along five trays of her famous homemade treats, which disappeared within the first hour.
all.zh: 媽媽帶來五盤她有名的手工點心，第一個小時內就被搶光了。

all.en: Dad set up a small repair station, helping new adopters secure their leashes, harnesses, and carriers.
all.zh: 爸爸架起一個小型修理站，幫助新領養人檢查並固定牽繩、胸背帶和外出籠。

all.en: By the end of the long sunny weekend, twenty-two animals had found loving homes through the fair.
all.zh: 經過漫長陽光燦爛的週末，園遊會共為二十二隻動物找到了充滿愛的家。

all.en: A local college professor offered Mia a small scholarship to attend an animal welfare summer program.
all.zh: 一位當地大學教授提供了一份小額獎學金，邀請米雅參加動物福利暑期課程。

all.en: That night, Mia wrote in her notebook that kindness, once planted, never truly stops growing.
all.zh: 那晚，米雅在筆記本上寫下：善意一旦種下，就永遠不會真的停止成長。

all.en: The next weekend, Cookie knocked over Mia's nightstand lamp while chasing a sunbeam and broke the bulb into three pieces.
all.zh: 下個週末，餅乾為了追一道陽光把米雅床頭的檯燈撞倒，燈泡裂成了三塊。

all.en: Mia laughed instead of scolding her, and Mom replaced the lamp with a sturdier one that very same afternoon.
all.zh: 米雅沒罵她，反而笑了出來，媽媽當天下午就換上一盞比較穩的新燈。

all.en: Coco started waiting by the front door every Saturday morning, somehow knowing it was shelter-volunteering day.
all.zh: 可可開始每個星期六早上在大門邊等待，不知怎麼地知道那天是去收容所當志工的日子。

all.en: A neighbor's child was scared of dogs, but after meeting Coco for ten patient minutes, she asked her mother for a puppy of her own.
all.zh: 有個鄰居家的小孩本來怕狗，但和可可耐心相處十分鐘後，她就跟媽媽說她也想要養一隻小狗。

all.en: Mia put together a simple checklist for first-time adopters, covering food, leash length, and the first vet visit.
all.zh: 米雅整理了一份簡單的清單給第一次領養的人，內容涵蓋飼料、牽繩長度，還有第一次看獸醫的事。

all.en: Dad printed copies on his office printer over lunch breaks, sneaking them home one stack at a time so Mom would not notice the paper cost.
all.zh: 爸爸利用午休時間在公司印表機印好，一次帶一疊回家，免得媽媽發現用了多少紙。

all.en: Mom started baking pumpkin-flavored treats just for autumn, and the shelter staff said the dogs went wild over them.
all.zh: 媽媽開始為秋天特別烤南瓜口味的點心，收容所工作人員說狗狗們愛瘋了。

all.en: Cookie surprised everyone by learning to sit beside Mia's desk during her homework time, like a tiny silent study partner.
all.zh: 餅乾出其不意地學會在米雅寫作業時乖乖坐在桌邊，像隻安靜的小小讀書夥伴。

all.en: On the night before Mia's first day of middle school, Coco refused to leave her doorway and slept curled up against her sneakers.
all.zh: 米雅上國中的前一晚，可可不肯離開她的房門口，蜷縮著靠在她的球鞋旁睡著了。

all.en: Mia tucked the small handbook from the adoption fair into her new backpack, promising herself she would always carry a piece of kindness to school.
all.zh: 米雅把領養園遊會那本小手冊塞進新書包，對自己承諾要永遠把一份善意帶到學校。
